name: POLICY-BUG-9
title: test-POLICY-1-no-stale-imports.py t2 comment misdescribes the regex
description: test-POLICY-1-no-stale-imports.py t2 comment (lines 53-54) says 'If the regex ^@./... is used, 0 imports are found (regex bug).' But test-imports-resolve.py line 47 actually uses '^(@[^\s]+)' — there is no '@./' regex anywhere in the codebase. The comment describes a hypothetical bug that does not exist in the source. Either the comment is leftover from when a bug was being reproduced, or it should be reworded to reference the regex actually in use. Location: .claude/features/policy/test/test-POLICY-1-no-stale-imports.py lines 53-54.
